chosen_action.title: Hide same-family curator handoff packets during active outreach hold windows

why_this_action.summary: The latest distribution brief and audit both said same-family curator outreach is paused, but the live execution board still surfaced a curator handoff packet as "Do now." That contradiction encouraged fake progress during a measurement hold, so the highest-leverage move was to repair the board truthfulness layer instead of sending another overlapping contact.

verification: Added a board-level guard that suppresses curator handoff packets while same-family outreach is paused by the active repair window.
Added a regression test covering the paused-curator-outreach case.
Regenerated drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md so the live board now matches the measurement-hold policy.

expected_outcome: The active marketing loop stops treating a blocked same-family curator packet as an immediate executable asset, reducing fake progress and increasing the odds that the next slot goes to a genuinely different outcome-bearing lane.

measurement_window.success_metric: The execution board no longer surfaces same-family curator handoff packets as do-now work during the current outreach hold, and subsequent runs choose a genuinely different lane or a truthful follow-through action.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If later runs still advertise blocked same-family curator work as immediately executable during the same hold window, extend the repair from the board layer into lane-packet generation and selection surfaces.
